---
layout: page
title: Teaching
excerpt: Evidence of Teaching Effectiveness
engine: knitr 
resources:
  - "assets/Joyce_TE.pdf"
cv:
  pdf: "assets/Joyce_TE.pdf"
---

## Instructor of Record

*Comparative Politics and Ethics (Graduate Level), Fall 2026*

*Introduction to Political Science (Graduate Level), Summer 2026*

*Quantitative Analysis for Social Science, Fall 2025 (Instructor effectiveness eval: 1.54, 1 = highest to 5 = lowest)*

## Teaching Assistant

*Methods Support for Honors Theses & Advanced Seminars, Spring 2026*

*First Year Writing Intensive Seminar, Fall 2025*

*U.S Elections 2024, Fall 2024*

*Houston Action Research Team, Rice Center for Civic Leadership, Fall 2022 - Spring 2024*

## Teaching Effectiveness

```{css echo=FALSE}
.embed-container {
    position: relative;
    padding-bottom: 129%;
    height: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    max-width: 100%;
}
.embed-container iframe,
.embed-container object,
.embed-container embed {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
}
```

```{=html}
<p class="text-center">
  <a class="btn btn-primary btn-lg cv-download" href="`r rmarkdown::metadata$cv$pdf`" target="_blank">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-file-arrow-down"></i>&ensp;Download Teaching Effectiveness
  </a>
</p>
<div class="embed-container">
  <iframe src="`r rmarkdown::metadata$cv$pdf`#toolbar=0&navpanes=0" style="border: 0.5px;width: 100%;"></iframe>
</div>
```
